files.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <title>tangle + 手指追踪毛线链</title>
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/p5@1.4.0/lib/p5.min.js"></script>
  <script src="https://unpkg.com/ml5@0.6.0/dist/ml5.min.js"></script>
  <style>body{margin:0;overflow:hidden;}</style>
</head>
<body>
<script>
let canvasWidth = 600, canvasHeight = 600;
let wovenGrid, ghostYarn;
let windStrength = 0.2;

// ml5 Handpose
let video, handposeModel, predictions = [];

// —————————————————————————————————————————————
// 设置
function setup() {
  createCanvas(canvasWidth, canvasHeight);
  // 摄像与手势
  video = createCapture(VIDEO);
  video.size(canvasWidth, canvasHeight);
  video.hide();
  handposeModel = ml5.handpose(video, ()=>console.log('Handpose loaded'));
  handposeModel.on('predict', res=> predictions = res);

  // 原有织物网格
  wovenGrid = new WovenGrid();

  // 新增：手指追踪毛线链
  // 起始在画布中心，长度 300px，粗细 10px，颜色随机
  ghostYarn = new Yarn(canvasWidth*0.5, canvasHeight*0.5, 300, 10, random(yarnColors));
  // 取消第一段锁定，让我们手动更新它
  ghostYarn.particles[0].locked = false;
}

function modelReady(){ /* noop */ }

function draw() {
  background('#f5f5f5');

  // 1) 更新和显示原有的网格
  wovenGrid.applyWind();
  wovenGrid.applyFingerInteraction(predictions);
  wovenGrid.update();
  wovenGrid.display();

  // 2) 手指追踪：把 ghostsYarn 的第0个粒子直接设到指尖
  if (predictions.length > 0) {
    let tip = predictions[0].annotations.indexFinger[3]; // 食指尖
    let fx = tip[0], fy = tip[1];
    // 手动更新第一个粒子的位置和前一次位置，确保链条紧贴手指
    ghostYarn.particles[0].pos.set(fx, fy);
    ghostYarn.particles[0].prevPos.set(fx, fy);
  }

  // 3) 更新 & 显示 ghostYarn
  ghostYarn.applyWind();
  // 不需要 applyFinger，因为它自己就跟随手指
  ghostYarn.update();
  ghostYarn.display();

  // 4) 可视化手指尖
  drawHand();
}

// 在画布上画出所有关键点（这里仅标食指尖）
function drawHand() {
  noStroke(); fill(255,0,0,180);
  if (predictions.length > 0) {
    let hand = predictions[0];
    // 画食指尖
    let [x,y] = hand.annotations.indexFinger[3];
    ellipse(x, y, 16, 16);
  }
}


// —————————————————————————————————————————————
// 以下是你原来的 Particle/Spring/Yarn/WovenGrid 代码，保持不变

class Particle {
  constructor(x, y, locked = false) {
    this.pos = createVector(x, y);
    this.prevPos = createVector(x, y);
    this.acc = createVector(0, 0);
    this.locked = locked;
    this.fuzzyEffect = random(0.8, 1.2);
  }
  addForce(f) { this.acc.add(f); }
  verlet() {
    if (this.locked) return;
    let vel = p5.Vector.sub(this.pos, this.prevPos);
    this.prevPos.set(this.pos);
    this.pos.add(vel);
    this.pos.add(this.acc);
    this.acc.set(0, 0);
  }
}

class Spring {
  constructor(a, b, restLen, stiffness) {
    this.a = a; this.b = b;
    this.restLen = restLen; this.stiffness = stiffness;
  }
  satisfy() {
    let delta = p5.Vector.sub(this.b.pos, this.a.pos);
    let dist = delta.mag();
    let diff = (dist - this.restLen) / dist;
    let offset = delta.mult(0.5 * this.stiffness * diff);
    if (!this.a.locked) this.a.pos.add(offset);
    if (!this.b.locked) this.b.pos.sub(offset);
  }
}

class Yarn {
  constructor(startX, startY, length, thickness, color) {
    this.thickness = thickness;
    this.color = color;
    this.colorObj = this.parseColor(color);
    this.particles = [];
    this.springs = [];
    this.fuzzySize = random(25, 40);
    this.fuzzyDensity = int(random(20, 25));
    this.init(startX, startY, length);
  }
  parseColor(c) {
    if (c.startsWith('#')) {
      return {
        r: parseInt(c.slice(1, 3), 16),
        g: parseInt(c.slice(3, 5), 16),
        b: parseInt(c.slice(5, 7), 16)
      };
    }
    return {r:255,g:255,b:255};
  }
  init(x, y, length) {
    let segments = 20, segLen = abs(length) / segments;
    for (let i = 0; i <= segments; i++) {
      let t = i/segments;
      let px = x + length * t, py = y;
      let locked = (i === 0);
      let p = new Particle(px + random(-3,3), py + random(-3,3), locked);
      this.particles.push(p);
      if (i > 0) {
        let a = this.particles[i-1];
        this.springs.push(new Spring(a, p, segLen, 0.8));
        if (i > 1) {
          let a2 = this.particles[i-2];
          this.springs.push(new Spring(a2, p, segLen*2, 0.2));
        }
      }
    }
  }
  applyWind() {
    for (let p of this.particles) {
      p.addForce(createVector(sin(frameCount*0.02)*windStrength, 0.05));
    }
  }
  applyFinger(pred) {
    const tipIndices = [4,8,12,16,20];
    pred.forEach(hand => {
      tipIndices.forEach(i => {
        let [fx,fy] = hand.landmarks[i];
        this.particles.forEach(p => {
          let d = dist(p.pos.x, p.pos.y, fx, fy);
          if (d < 80) {
            let dir = createVector(fx - p.pos.x, fy - p.pos.y).mult(0.2);
            p.pos.add(dir);
          }
        });
      });
    });
  }
  update() {
    this.particles.forEach(p => p.verlet());
    for (let k=0; k<5; k++) this.springs.forEach(s => s.satisfy());
  }
  display() {
    // 主线
    noFill(); strokeWeight(this.thickness); stroke(this.color);
    beginShape();
    this.particles.forEach(p => vertex(p.pos.x, p.pos.y));
    endShape();
    // 毛茸茸
    this.particles.forEach(p => {
      for (let k=0; k<this.fuzzyDensity; k++) {
        let ang = random(TWO_PI),
            r = random(this.fuzzySize*0.5,this.fuzzySize);
        let ex = p.pos.x + cos(ang)*r,
            ey = p.pos.y + sin(ang)*r;
        stroke(this.color); strokeWeight(1);
        line(p.pos.x, p.pos.y, ex, ey);
      }
    });
  }
}

class WovenGrid {
  constructor() {
    this.yarns = [];
    this.colors = yarnColors;
    const len = 500, step = 60;
    const leftX = 50, rightX = canvasWidth-50;
    const topY = 50, bottomY = canvasHeight-50;
    // 左
    for (let y=100; y<=450; y+=step) {
      this.yarns.push(new Yarn(leftX,y,len,random(8,12),random(this.colors)));
    }
    // 上
    for (let x=100; x<=450; x+=step) {
      let y1 = new Yarn(x, topY, len, random(8,12), random(this.colors));
      y1.particles.forEach(p=>{
        let dx=p.pos.x-x, dy=p.pos.y-topY;
        p.pos.set(x+dy, topY+dx); p.prevPos.set(p.pos);
      });
      this.yarns.push(y1);
    }
    // 右
    for (let y=100; y<=450; y+=step) {
      this.yarns.push(new Yarn(rightX,y,-len,random(8,12),random(this.colors)));
    }
    // 下
    for (let x=100; x<=450; x+=step) {
      let y3 = new Yarn(x, bottomY, -len, random(8,12), random(this.colors));
      y3.particles.forEach(p=>{
        let dx=p.pos.x-x, dy=p.pos.y-bottomY;
        p.pos.set(x+dy, bottomY+dx); p.prevPos.set(p.pos);
      });
      this.yarns.push(y3);
    }
  }
  applyWind() { this.yarns.forEach(y=>y.applyWind()); }
  applyFingerInteraction(p) { this.yarns.forEach(y=>y.applyFinger(p)); }
  update() { this.yarns.forEach(y=>y.update()); }
  display() { this.yarns.forEach(y=>y.display()); }
}

const yarnColors = [
  '#FF5252','#FF4081','#E040FB','#7C4DFF','#536DFE',
  '#448AFF','#40C4FF','#18FFFF','#64FFDA','#69F0AE',
  '#B2FF59','#EEFF41','#FFFF00','#FFD740','#FFAB40',
  '#FF6E40','#FF8A80','#EA80FC','#B388FF','#8C9EFF'
];
</script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>Face Constellation Blessing</title>
  <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/p5.js/1.4.0/p5.js"></script>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Indie+Flower&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <script src="https://unpkg.com/ml5@0.6.0/dist/ml5.min.js"></script>
  <style>
    body { margin: 0; overflow: hidden; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
<script>
  let video;
  let facemesh;
  let predictions = [];
  let angle = 0;
  let connections = [];
  let lastUpdate = 0;

  const blessingWords = [
    "Love", "Hope", "Joy", "Peace", "Dream",
    "Kindness", "Grace", "Wisdom", "Shine", "Calm",
    "Courage", "Power", "Strength", "Magic", "Glow"
  ];

  const blessingIndices = [
    10, 234, 454, 152, 9, 105, 334, 199, 425, 127, 356, 92, 299, 150, 200
  ];

  function setup() {
    createCanvas(640, 480);
    video = createCapture(VIDEO);
    video.size(width, height);
    video.hide();

    generateConnections();
    
    facemesh = ml5.facemesh(video, () => console.log("Model Ready!"));
    facemesh.on('predict', results => predictions = results);

    textFont('Indie Flower');
    textSize(14);
    textAlign(LEFT, CENTER);
  }

  function generateConnections() {
    connections = [];
    // 生成3-5条随机连线
    for(let i=0; i<random([3,4,5]); i++){
      let a = floor(random(blessingIndices.length));
      let b = (a + floor(random(2,5))) % blessingIndices.length;
      connections.push({
        from: a, 
        to: b,
        alpha: random(80, 160),
        speed: random(0.03, 0.06)
      });
    }
  }

  function draw() {
    image(video, 0, 0, width, height);
    angle += 0.025;

    // 每2.5秒更新星座连线
    if(millis() - lastUpdate > 2500){
      generateConnections();
      lastUpdate = millis();
    }

    if(predictions.length > 0){
      const keypoints = predictions[0].scaledMesh;

      // 绘制星座连线
      strokeWeight(0.7);
      for(let conn of connections){
        try {
          const [x1, y1] = keypoints[blessingIndices[conn.from]];
          const [x2, y2] = keypoints[blessingIndices[conn.to]];
          stroke(255, 182, 193, conn.alpha * abs(sin(angle*conn.speed)));
          line(x1, y1, x2, y2);
        } catch{}
      }

      // 绘制祝福光点
      blessingIndices.forEach((index, i) => {
        const [x, y] = keypoints[index];
        const groupPhase = angle + (i%3)*1.5; // 分三组交替运动

        // 多层光晕
        for(let j=5; j>0; j--){
          fill(255, 105+j*12, 180, 6*j*(0.8+sin(groupPhase + j*0.3)));
          noStroke();
          ellipse(x, y, j*(4 + sin(groupPhase)*2), j*(4.5 + sin(groupPhase)*2));
        }

        // 核心光点
        fill(255, 180 + sin(angle+i)*70, 230);
        ellipse(x, y, 5 + sin(groupPhase)*2, 5 + sin(groupPhase)*2);

        // 浮动文字
        fill(255, 200 + sin(angle*1.5+i)*55);
        text(blessingWords[i], x + 10 + sin(angle*0.8)*3, y + cos(angle*0.8)*2);
      });
    }
  }
</script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>Face Constellation Blessing - Three Faces</title>
  <!-- p5.js 和 ml5.js -->
  <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/p5.js/1.4.0/p5.js"></script>
  <script src="https://unpkg.com/ml5@0.6.0/dist/ml5.min.js"></script>
  <!-- 手写字体 -->
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Indie+Flower&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    body { margin: 0; overflow: hidden; }
    .fs-btn {
      position: absolute;
      top: 10px;
      right: 10px;
      font-size: 12px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
      border: none;
      padding: 4px 8px;
      cursor: pointer;
      z-index: 1000;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <button class="fs-btn">⛶</button>
  <script>
    // 固定视频分辨率，用于 facemesh 预测
    const VIDEO_W = 640;
    const VIDEO_H = 480;

    let video, facemesh, predictions = [];
    let angle = 0, lastUpdate = 0;
    let scaleX, scaleY, offsetX, offsetY;

    // 祝福词与痣点索引
    const blessingWords = [
      "Love","Hope","Joy","Peace","Dream","Kindness","Grace","Wisdom","Shine","Calm",
      "Courage","Power","Strength","Magic","Glow","Harmony","Radiance","Serenity","Bliss",
      "Unity","Faith","Truth","Compassion","Healing","Prosperity","Gratitude","Inspiration",
      "Balance","Miracle","Hopefulness","Abundance","Laughter"
    ];
    const blessingIndices = [
      10,234,454,152,9,105,334,199,425,127,356,92,299,150,200,
      93,323,205,117,346,285,55,250,18
    ];

    // 分组：三张脸
    const indexGroups = [[], [], []];
    const wordGroups  = [[], [], []];
    blessingIndices.forEach((idx,i) => indexGroups[i%3].push(idx));
    blessingWords.forEach((w,i) => wordGroups[i%3].push(w));

    // 每张脸上的连线设置
    let faceConnections = [];
    function generateConnections() {
      const conns = [];
      for (let i = 0; i < random([3,4,5]); i++) {
        const a = floor(random(indexGroups[0].length));
        const b = (a + floor(random(1, indexGroups[0].length))) % indexGroups[0].length;
        conns.push({
          from: a,
          to: b,
          alpha: random(80, 160),
          speed: random(0.03, 0.06)
        });
      }
      return conns;
    }
    function generateAllConnections() {
      faceConnections = [
        generateConnections(),
        generateConnections(),
        generateConnections()
      ];
    }

    function setup() {
      createCanvas(windowWidth, windowHeight);
      video = createCapture(VIDEO);
      video.size(VIDEO_W, VIDEO_H);
      video.hide();

      facemesh = ml5.facemesh(video, () => console.log("Model Ready"));
      facemesh.on('predict', results => predictions = results);

      textFont('Indie Flower');
      textSize(8);  // 文字尺寸
      textAlign(LEFT, CENTER);

      generateAllConnections();
      select('.fs-btn').mousePressed(() => fullscreen(!fullscreen()));
      updateScaling();
    }

    function windowResized() {
      resizeCanvas(windowWidth, windowHeight);
      updateScaling();
    }

    function updateScaling() {
      // COVER 模式：铺满并裁剪
      const s = max(width / VIDEO_W, height / VIDEO_H);
      scaleX = scaleY = s;
      offsetX = (width  - VIDEO_W * s) * 0.5;
      offsetY = (height - VIDEO_H * s) * 0.5;
    }

    function draw() {
      background(0);

      // 1) 绘制并镜像视频
      push();
        translate(offsetX, offsetY);
        scale(scaleX, scaleY);
        push();
          translate(VIDEO_W, 0);
          scale(-1, 1);
          image(video, 0, 0);
      //滤镜
         blendMode(ADD);
    noStroke();
    fill(255, 202, 241, 45);         //透明度，数值越大越亮
    rect(0, 0, VIDEO_W, VIDEO_H);
    blendMode(BLEND);
        pop();
      pop();

      // 2) 绘制 facemesh（手动镜像 x 坐标，但不翻转整体）
      push();
        translate(offsetX, offsetY);
        scale(scaleX, scaleY);

        for (let f = 0; f < min(predictions.length, 3); f++) {
          const keypoints = predictions[f].scaledMesh;
          const idxs = indexGroups[f];
          const words = wordGroups[f];

          // —— 绘制镜像后的连线
          strokeWeight(0.7);
          for (let conn of faceConnections[f]) {
            const [ox1, oy1] = keypoints[idxs[conn.from]];
            const [ox2, oy2] = keypoints[idxs[conn.to]];
            const x1 = VIDEO_W - ox1, y1 = oy1;
            const x2 = VIDEO_W - ox2, y2 = oy2;
            stroke(255, 182, 193, conn.alpha * abs(sin(angle * conn.speed)));
            line(x1, y1, x2, y2);
          }

          // —— 绘制镜像后的痣光晕、闪点与文字
          idxs.forEach((idx, i) => {
            const [ox, oy] = keypoints[idx];
            const x = VIDEO_W - ox;
            const y = oy;
            const phase = angle + f * 1.5 + i * 0.3;

            noStroke();
            for (let j = 5; j > 0; j--) {
              fill(255, 105 + j * 12, 180, 6 * j * (0.8 + sin(phase)));
              ellipse(x, y, j * (4 + sin(phase) * 2), j * (4.5 + sin(phase) * 2));
            }
            fill(255, 180 + sin(angle + f + i) * 70, 230);
            ellipse(x, y, 5 + sin(phase) * 2, 5 + sin(phase) * 2);

            fill(255, 200 + sin(angle * 1.5 + f + i) * 55);
            text(words[i], x + 10 + sin(phase) * 3, y + cos(phase) * 2);
          });
        }
      pop();

      // 更新时间与连线
      angle += 0.025;
      if (millis() - lastUpdate > 2500) {
        generateAllConnections();
        lastUpdate = millis();
      }
    }
  </script>
</body>
</html>

files.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <title>3D 手势交互 漩涡 + 全线毛茸茸</title>
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/p5@1.4.0/lib/p5.min.js"></script>
  <script src="https://unpkg.com/ml5@0.6.0/dist/ml5.min.js"></script>
  <style>
    body { margin:0; overflow:hidden; background:#202020; }
    canvas { display:block; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
<script>
// —— 全局变量 —— 
let seed = Math.random() * 15283;
let t, num, radius;
let palettes, color_setup2;
let v_planet = [];

// handpose
let video, handposeModel, predictions = [];
let ctrlRotX=0, ctrlRotY=0, ctrlSpeed=0.005;

// 配色方案
palettes = {
  bg: "#202020",
  sets: [
    "ffffff-171F26-4A5259-7B848C-AEB7BF",
    "D94389-4D578C-3791A6-3DF2D1-F28080",
    "F28D35-D96A29-A66641-D9B0A7-F2DAD8",
    "F2A7D8-473959-655A8C-9F8FD9-5979D9",
    "025951-012623-21BF92-73D9BC-0D0D0D"
  ].map(s=>s.split("-").map(a=>"#"+a))
};

function setup() {
  // 摄像头+handpose
  video = createCapture(VIDEO);
  video.size(320,240);
  video.hide();
  handposeModel = ml5.handpose(video, ()=>console.log("Handpose ready"));
  handposeModel.on("predict", res=> predictions=res);

  // WEBGL 画布
  createCanvas(windowWidth, windowHeight, WEBGL);
  color_setup2 = random(palettes.sets);

  // 漩涡参数
  randomSeed(seed);
  num = int(random(12,20));
  t = 0;
  for(let i=0;i<num;i++) v_planet.push(createVector());
  updateRadius();
}

function windowResized() {
  resizeCanvas(windowWidth, windowHeight);
  updateRadius();
}

function updateRadius() {
  radius = max(windowWidth, windowHeight)*0.8;
}

// 手势控制
function updateHandControls() {
  if(!predictions.length) return;
  let [x,y,z] = predictions[0].landmarks[8];
  ctrlRotY = map(x,0,video.width, PI/2,-PI/2);
  ctrlRotX = map(y,0,video.height, -PI/2,PI/2);
  ctrlSpeed = map(z,-0.15,0.15, 0.02,0.002,true);
}

// 画“球心”周围短线
function drawFuzzyBall(col,d=32,s=24){
  stroke(col); strokeWeight(1);
  for(let i=0;i<d;i++){
    let u=random(-1,1), th=random(TWO_PI);
    let r=s*sqrt(1-u*u);
    line(0,0,0, r*cos(th),r*sin(th), u*s );
  }
}

// 在一点周围画短线
function drawFuzzyPoint3D(col,d=12,l=12){
  stroke(col); strokeWeight(1);
  for(let i=0;i<d;i++){
    let th=random(TWO_PI), ph=random(TWO_PI);
    let r=random(l*0.6, l);
    line(0,0,0,
      r*cos(th)*sin(ph),
      r*sin(th)*sin(ph),
      r*cos(ph)
    );
  }
}

function draw() {
  // 背景 + 摄像头贴图
  background(0);
  push();
    translate(0,0,-500);
    texture(video);
    noStroke();
    plane(width*2, height*2);
  pop();

  updateHandControls();

  // 计算漩涡点
  randomSeed(seed);
  for(let i=0;i<num;i++){
    let a = (TWO_PI/num)*i;
    let n = noise(a*0.1, frameCount*0.003);
    let x = radius*sin(a+t)*n*0.5;
    let y = radius*cos(a+t)*n*0.5;
    v_planet[i].set(x,y);
  }

  // 3D 漩涡 + 毛茸茸
  push();
    rotateX(ctrlRotX);
    rotateY(ctrlRotY);

    for(let q=0;q<1;q+=0.4){
      for(let v of v_planet){
        let col = random(color_setup2);

        // 球心
        push();
          translate(v.x, v.y, 50);
          noFill(); stroke(col);
          sphere(6);
          drawFuzzyBall(col,32,24);
        pop();

        // 三段直线 + 全线短线
        let path = [
          createVector(0,0,0),
          createVector(v.x*0.5, v.y*0.5, 30),
          createVector(v.x,    v.y,    60)
        ];
        stroke(col); strokeWeight(2); noFill();
        beginShape();
          for(let p of path) curveVertex(p.x,p.y,p.z);
        endShape();

        // 在线段之间插点并画短线
        for(let s=0;s<path.length-1;s++){
          let p0=path[s], p1=path[s+1];
          let seg = 6; // 每段取 6 个中点
          for(let k=1;k<seg;k++){
            let u = k/seg;
            let px = lerp(p0.x,p1.x,u),
                py = lerp(p0.y,p1.y,u),
                pz = lerp(p0.z,p1.z,u);
            push();
              translate(px,py,pz);
              drawFuzzyPoint3D(col,12,12);
            pop();
          }
        }

        // 也在线的端点再加一下
        for(let p of path){
          push();
            translate(p.x,p.y,p.z);
            drawFuzzyPoint3D(col,12,12);
          pop();
        }
      }
    }
  pop();

  t += ctrlSpeed;
}
</script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>Tangle 手势拉拽弹力线</title>
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/p5@1.4.0/lib/p5.min.js"></script>
  <script src="https://unpkg.com/ml5@0.6.0/dist/ml5.min.js"></script>
  <style>
    body { margin: 0; overflow: hidden; }
    canvas { display: block; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
<script>
// ---- 参数配置 ----
const NUM_THREADS   = 10;     // 线段数量
const SPRING_STIFF  = 0.04;   // 弹簧刚度（越小越软，动作越慢）
const DAMPING       = 0.9;    // 阻尼（越大越快衰减）
const GRAB_RADIUS   = 100;    // 手指作用半径
const GRAB_STRENGTH = 0.25;   // 手指抓拽强度

// 颜色调色板
const palette = [
  "#FF5252","#FF4081","#7C4DFF","#448AFF","#40C4FF",
  "#B388FF","#FFAB40","#69F0AE","#FFD740","#FF6E40"
];

let video, handposeModel, predictions = [];
let handX = 0, handY = 0;
let threads = [];

function setup() {
  createCanvas(windowWidth, windowHeight, WEBGL);

  // 初始化摄像头 + Handpose
  video = createCapture(VIDEO);
  video.size(320, 240);
  video.hide();
  handposeModel = ml5.handpose(video, () => console.log("Handpose 模型已加载"));
  handposeModel.on("predict", results => predictions = results);

  // 初始化线程状态
  for (let i = 0; i < NUM_THREADS; i++) {
    threads.push({
      x: random(-200, 200),
      y: random(-200, 200),
      vx: 0, vy: 0,
      color: random(palette),
      offset: random(30, 80)
    });
  }
}

function windowResized() {
  resizeCanvas(windowWidth, windowHeight);
}

function updateHandPosition() {
  if (predictions.length > 0) {
    // 取食指尖位置
    const [x2d, y2d] = predictions[0].annotations.indexFinger[3];
    // 转换到 WEBGL 坐标（中心为原点）
    handX = x2d - width / 2;
    handY = y2d - height / 2;
  }
}

function draw() {
  background(245);

  // 更新手指坐标
  updateHandPosition();

  // 绘制并更新所有线段
  push(); // 进入 WEBGL 坐标系
  threads.forEach((t, i) => {
    // 加上原先的“旋转”偏移，保持旧视觉
    const swirlX = sin(frameCount / t.offset + i) * 20;
    const swirlY = cos(frameCount / t.offset + i) * 20;

    // 目标点 = 手指位置 + 旋转偏移
    const dx = handX + swirlX - t.x;
    const dy = handY + swirlY - t.y;

    // 弹簧力作用
    t.vx += dx * SPRING_STIFF;
    t.vy += dy * SPRING_STIFF;

    // 阻尼
    t.vx *= DAMPING;
    t.vy *= DAMPING;

    // 更新位置
    t.x += t.vx;
    t.y += t.vy;

    // 画线
    stroke(t.color);
    strokeWeight(4);
    line(0, 0, 0, t.x, t.y, 0);
  });

  // 可视化手指尖
  noStroke();
  fill(255, 0, 0);
  translate(handX, handY, 0);
  sphere(8);
  pop(); // 恢复

  // 【可选】将摄像头预览放在左上角 (2D 覆盖)
  push();
    resetMatrix();
    translate(-width/2, -height/2);
    image(video, 10, 10, 160, 120);
  pop();
}
</script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>tangle</title>
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/p5@1.4.0/lib/p5.min.js"></script>
  <script src="https://unpkg.com/ml5@0.6.0/dist/ml5.min.js"></script>
  <style>body { margin: 0; overflow: hidden; }</style>
</head>
<body>
<script>
let canvasWidth = 600;
let canvasHeight = 600;
let wovenGrid;
let windStrength = 0.2;

// ml5 Handpose
let video;
let handposeModel;
let predictions = [];

function setup() {
  createCanvas(canvasWidth, canvasHeight);
  video = createCapture(VIDEO);
  video.size(canvasWidth, canvasHeight);
  video.hide();

  handposeModel = ml5.handpose(video, modelReady);
  handposeModel.on('predict', results => predictions = results);

  wovenGrid = new WovenGrid();
  background('#f5f5f5');
}

function modelReady() {
  console.log('Handpose model loaded');
}

function draw() {
  background('#f5f5f5'); // 固定柔和背景，不再闪烁

  wovenGrid.applyWind();
  wovenGrid.applyFingerInteraction(predictions);
  wovenGrid.update();
  wovenGrid.display();

  drawHand();
}

function drawHand() {
  noStroke();
  fill(0, 100, 100, 150);
  const tipIndices = [4, 8, 12, 16, 20];
  predictions.forEach(hand => {
    tipIndices.forEach(i => {
      const [x, y] = hand.landmarks[i];
      ellipse(x, y, 12, 12);
    });
  });
}

// --- Classes for Particles, Springs, Yarns and WovenGrid ---

class Particle {
  constructor(x, y, locked = false) {
    this.pos = createVector(x, y);
    this.prevPos = createVector(x, y);
    this.acc = createVector(0, 0);
    this.locked = locked;
    this.fuzzyEffect = random(0.8, 1.2);
  }
  addForce(f) { this.acc.add(f); }
  verlet() {
    if (this.locked) return;
    let vel = p5.Vector.sub(this.pos, this.prevPos);
    this.prevPos.set(this.pos);
    this.pos.add(vel);
    this.pos.add(this.acc);
    this.acc.set(0, 0);
  }
}

class Spring {
  constructor(a, b, restLen, stiffness) {
    this.a = a; this.b = b; this.restLen = restLen; this.stiffness = stiffness;
  }
  satisfy() {
    let delta = p5.Vector.sub(this.b.pos, this.a.pos);
    let dist = delta.mag();
    let diff = (dist - this.restLen) / dist;
    let offset = delta.mult(0.5 * this.stiffness * diff);
    if (!this.a.locked) this.a.pos.add(offset);
    if (!this.b.locked) this.b.pos.sub(offset);
  }
}

class Yarn {
  constructor(startX, startY, length, thickness, color) {
    this.thickness = thickness;
    this.color = color;
    this.colorObj = this.parseColor(color);
    this.particles = [];
    this.springs = [];
    this.fuzzySize = random(25, 40);
    this.fuzzyDensity = int(random(20, 25));
    this.init(startX, startY, length);
  }

  parseColor(colorStr) {
    if (colorStr.startsWith('#')) {
      const r = parseInt(colorStr.slice(1, 3), 16);
      const g = parseInt(colorStr.slice(3, 5), 16);
      const b = parseInt(colorStr.slice(5, 7), 16);
      return { r, g, b };
    }
    return { r: 255, g: 255, b: 255 };
  }

  init(x, y, length) {
    let segments = 20;
    let segLen = length / segments;
    for (let i = 0; i <= segments; i++) {
      let px = x + (length * (i / segments));
      let py = y;
      let locked = (i === 0);
      let p = new Particle(px + random(-3, 3), py + random(-3, 3), locked);
      this.particles.push(p);
      if (i > 0) {
        let a = this.particles[i - 1];
        this.springs.push(new Spring(a, p, segLen, 0.8));
        if (i > 1) {
          let prev2 = this.particles[i - 2];
          this.springs.push(new Spring(prev2, p, segLen * 2, 0.2));
        }
      }
    }
  }

  applyWind() {
    for (let p of this.particles) {
      p.addForce(createVector(sin(frameCount * 0.02) * windStrength, 0.05));
    }
  }

  applyFinger(predictions) {
    const tipIndices = [4, 8, 12, 16, 20];
    predictions.forEach(hand => {
      tipIndices.forEach(i => {
        let [fx, fy] = hand.landmarks[i];
        this.particles.forEach(p => {
          let d = dist(p.pos.x, p.pos.y, fx, fy);
          if (d < 80) {
            let dir = createVector(fx - p.pos.x, fy - p.pos.y).mult(0.2);
            p.pos.add(dir);
          }
        });
      });
    });
  }

  update() {
    this.particles.forEach(p => p.verlet());
    for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) this.springs.forEach(s => s.satisfy());
  }

  display() {
    // 1. 先画主线
    noFill();
    strokeWeight(this.thickness);
    stroke(this.color);
    beginShape();
    this.particles.forEach(p => vertex(p.pos.x, p.pos.y));
    endShape();

    // 2. 再画毛茸茸放射线
    this.displayFuzzy();
  }

  displayFuzzy() {
    for (let i = 0; i < this.particles.length - 1; i++) {
      let p = this.particles[i];
      let q = this.particles[i + 1];
      let d = p5.Vector.dist(p.pos, q.pos);
      let steps = constrain(int(d / 8), 2, 10);
      for (let j = 0; j <= steps; j++) {
        let t = j / steps;
        let fuzzyPoint = createVector(
          lerp(p.pos.x, q.pos.x, t),
          lerp(p.pos.y, q.pos.y, t)
        );
        fuzzyPoint.x += random(-2, 2);
        fuzzyPoint.y += random(-2, 2);

        const { r, g, b } = this.colorObj;
        const color1 = `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, 0.8)`;
        const color2 = `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, 0.2)`;
        drawRadiatingLines(fuzzyPoint, this.fuzzyDensity, 1.2, this.fuzzySize, color1, color2);
      }
    }
  }
}

class WovenGrid {
  constructor() {
    this.yarns = [];
    this.colors = yarnColors;
    const len = 500;
    const leftX = 50, rightX = canvasWidth - 50;
    const topY = 50, bottomY = canvasHeight - 50;
    const step = 60;

    // 左侧：水平向右
    for (let y = 100; y <= 450; y += step) {
      this.yarns.push(
        new Yarn(leftX, y, len, random(8, 12), random(this.colors))
      );
    }

    // 上方：竖直向下（旋转原有水平）
    for (let x = 100; x <= 450; x += step) {
      let yarn = new Yarn(x, topY, len, random(8, 12), random(this.colors));
      yarn.particles.forEach(p => {
        let dx = p.pos.x - x, dy = p.pos.y - topY;
        p.pos.set(x + dy, topY + dx);
        p.prevPos.set(p.pos);
      });
      this.yarns.push(yarn);
    }

    // 右侧：水平向左（负长度）
    for (let y = 100; y <= 450; y += step) {
      this.yarns.push(
        new Yarn(rightX, y, -len, random(8, 12), random(this.colors))
      );
    }

    // 底部：竖直向上（负长度 + 同样旋转）
    for (let x = 100; x <= 450; x += step) {
      let yarn = new Yarn(x, bottomY, -len, random(8, 12), random(this.colors));
      yarn.particles.forEach(p => {
        let dx = p.pos.x - x, dy = p.pos.y - bottomY;
        // 同样用 dx,dy 做旋转，但负 len 已经让它向上
        p.pos.set(x + dy, bottomY + dx);
        p.prevPos.set(p.pos);
      });
      this.yarns.push(yarn);
    }
  }

  applyWind()               { this.yarns.forEach(y => y.applyWind()); }
  applyFingerInteraction(p) { this.yarns.forEach(y => y.applyFinger(p)); }
  update()                  { this.yarns.forEach(y => y.update()); }
  display()                 { this.yarns.forEach(y => y.display()); }
}


// -- Fuzzy helper

function drawRadiatingLines(point, density, width, size, color1, color2) {
  let baseRadius = size;
  strokeWeight(width);
  for (let i = 0; i < density; i++) {
    let radius = baseRadius * (0.7 + 0.3 * Math.random());
    let angle = Math.random() * TWO_PI;
    let endX = point.x + radius * cos(angle);
    let endY = point.y + radius * sin(angle);
    gradientLine(point.x, point.y, endX, endY, color1, color2);
  }
}

function gradientLine(x1, y1, x2, y2, color1, color2) {
  let grad = drawingContext.createLinearGradient(x1, y1, x2, y2);
  grad.addColorStop(0, color1);
  grad.addColorStop(1, color2);
  drawingContext.strokeStyle = grad;
  line(x1, y1, x2, y2);
}

const yarnColors = [
  '#FF5252', '#FF4081', '#E040FB', '#7C4DFF', '#536DFE',
  '#448AFF', '#40C4FF', '#18FFFF', '#64FFDA', '#69F0AE',
  '#B2FF59', '#EEFF41', '#FFFF00', '#FFD740', '#FFAB40',
  '#FF6E40', '#FF8A80', '#EA80FC', '#B388FF', '#8C9EFF'
];
</script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>Tangle - Yarn Interaction</title>
  <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/p5.js/1.4.0/p5.js"></script>
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/p5.brush"></script>
  <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/p5.js/1.4.0/addons/p5.dom.min.js"></script>

  <script src="https://unpkg.com/ml5@0.6.0/dist/ml5.min.js"></script>
  <style> body { margin: 0; overflow: hidden; } </style>
</head>
<body>
<script>
let yarns = [];
let wovenGrid;
let canvasWidth = 600;
let canvasHeight = 600;

// ml5 Handpose
let video;
let handpose;
let predictions = [];
let prevLandmarks = null;

// yarn colors
const yarnColors = [
  '#FF5252', '#FF4081', '#E040FB', '#7C4DFF', '#536DFE', '#448AFF',
  '#40C4FF', '#18FFFF', '#64FFDA', '#69F0AE', '#B2FF59', '#EEFF41',
  '#FFFF00', '#FFD740', '#FFAB40', '#FF6E40', '#FF8A80', '#EA80FC',
  '#B388FF', '#8C9EFF', '#FFD180', '#84FFFF'
];

class Yarn {
  constructor(startX, startY, length, thickness, color) {
    this.points = [];
    this.thickness = thickness || random(8, 16);
    this.color = color || random(yarnColors);
    this.dragging = false;
    this.dragIndex = -1;
    this.dragOffset = createVector(0, 0);
    this.elasticity = random(0.03, 0.08);
    this.tension = random(0.5, 0.8);
    this.gravity = random(0.05, 0.2);

    let x = startX;
    let y = startY;
    const segmentLength = length / 20;
    for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
      let nextX = x + random(-10, 10);
      let nextY = y + random(-5, 15);
      this.points.push({
        x: nextX,
        y: nextY,
        origX: nextX,
        origY: nextY,
        vx: 0,
        vy: 0
      });
      x = nextX;
      y = nextY;
    }
  }

  update() {
    for (let i = 0; i < this.points.length; i++) {
      let p = this.points[i];
      if (!this.dragging || i !== this.dragIndex) {
        let dx = p.origX - p.x;
        let dy = p.origY - p.y;
        p.vx += dx * this.elasticity;
        p.vy += dy * this.elasticity;
        p.vy += this.gravity;

        if (i > 0) {
          let prev = this.points[i - 1];
          dx = prev.x - p.x;
          dy = prev.y - p.y;
          let dist = sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
          let targetDist = 15;
          if (dist > targetDist) {
            let factor = this.tension * (dist - targetDist) / dist;
            p.vx += dx * factor;
            p.vy += dy * factor;
            prev.vx -= dx * factor;
            prev.vy -= dy * factor;
          }
        }

        if (i < this.points.length - 1) {
          let next = this.points[i + 1];
          dx = next.x - p.x;
          dy = next.y - p.y;
          let dist = sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
          let targetDist = 15;
          if (dist > targetDist) {
            let factor = this.tension * (dist - targetDist) / dist;
            p.vx += dx * factor;
            p.vy += dy * factor;
            next.vx -= dx * factor;
            next.vy -= dy * factor;
          }
        }

        p.vx *= 0.95;
        p.vy *= 0.95;
        p.x += p.vx;
        p.y += p.vy;
      }
    }
  }

  display() {
    noFill();
    strokeWeight(this.thickness);
    stroke(this.color);
    beginShape();
    for (let i = 0; i < this.points.length; i++) {
      vertex(this.points[i].x, this.points[i].y);
    }
    endShape();

    fill(this.color);
    noStroke();
    ellipse(this.points[0].x, this.points[0].y, this.thickness * 1.2);
    ellipse(this.points[this.points.length - 1].x, this.points[this.points.length - 1].y, this.thickness * 1.2);

    for (let i = 3; i < this.points.length - 3; i += 4) {
      ellipse(this.points[i].x, this.points[i].y, this.thickness * 1.5);
    }
  }

  checkDrag(mouseX, mouseY) {
    for (let i = 0; i < this.points.length; i++) {
      let p = this.points[i];
      let d = dist(mouseX, mouseY, p.x, p.y);
      if (d < this.thickness * 1.5) {
        this.dragging = true;
        this.dragIndex = i;
        this.dragOffset.x = p.x - mouseX;
        this.dragOffset.y = p.y - mouseY;
        return true;
      }
    }
    return false;
  }

  drag(mouseX, mouseY) {
    if (this.dragging && this.dragIndex >= 0) {
      let p = this.points[this.dragIndex];
      p.x = mouseX + this.dragOffset.x;
      p.y = mouseY + this.dragOffset.y;
    }
  }

  endDrag() {
    this.dragging = false;
    this.dragIndex = -1;
  }
}

class WovenGrid {
  constructor() {
    this.yarns = [];
    this.draggingYarn = null;
    for (let y = 100; y < 450; y += 30) {
      this.createHorizontalYarn(50, y, 400 + random(0, 100), random(yarnColors));
    }
    for (let x = 100; x < 450; x += 30) {
      this.createVerticalYarn(x, 50, 400 + random(0, 100), random(yarnColors));
    }
  }

  createHorizontalYarn(x, y, length, color) {
    let yarn = new Yarn(x, y, length, random(10, 15), color);
    for (let i = 0; i < yarn.points.length; i++) {
      let progress = i / (yarn.points.length - 1);
      yarn.points[i].x = x + progress * length + random(-5, 5);
      yarn.points[i].y = y + sin(progress * TWO_PI * random(1, 3)) * random(5, 15) + random(-8, 8);
      yarn.points[i].origX = yarn.points[i].x;
      yarn.points[i].origY = yarn.points[i].y;
    }
    this.yarns.push(yarn);
  }

  createVerticalYarn(x, y, length, color) {
    let yarn = new Yarn(x, y, length, random(10, 15), color);
    for (let i = 0; i < yarn.points.length; i++) {
      let progress = i / (yarn.points.length - 1);
      yarn.points[i].x = x + sin(progress * TWO_PI * random(1, 3)) * random(5, 15) + random(-8, 8);
      yarn.points[i].y = y + progress * length + random(-5, 5);
      yarn.points[i].origX = yarn.points[i].x;
      yarn.points[i].origY = yarn.points[i].y;
    }
    this.yarns.push(yarn);
  }

  update() {
    if (mouseIsPressed && !this.draggingYarn) {
      for (let yarn of this.yarns) {
        if (yarn.checkDrag(mouseX, mouseY)) {
          this.draggingYarn = yarn;
          break;
        }
      }
    } else if (mouseIsPressed && this.draggingYarn) {
      this.draggingYarn.drag(mouseX, mouseY);
    } else if (this.draggingYarn) {
      this.draggingYarn.endDrag();
      this.draggingYarn = null;
    }

    for (let yarn of this.yarns) {
      yarn.update();
    }
  }

  display() {
    for (let yarn of this.yarns) {
      yarn.display();
    }
  }

  applyFingerAttraction(x, y) {
    for (let yarn of this.yarns) {
      for (let p of yarn.points) {
        let d = dist(x, y, p.x, p.y);
        if (d < 50) {
          let factor = (50 - d) / 50;
          p.vx += (x - p.x) * 0.1 * factor;
          p.vy += (y - p.y) * 0.1 * factor;
        }
      }
    }
  }

  applyDisturbance(landmarks) {
    if (!prevLandmarks) {
      prevLandmarks = landmarks;
      return;
    }

    let total = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i < landmarks.length; i++) {
      let dx = landmarks[i][0] - prevLandmarks[i][0];
      let dy = landmarks[i][1] - prevLandmarks[i][1];
      total += sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    }

    prevLandmarks = landmarks;
    let avgSpeed = total / landmarks.length;
    let shake = constrain(avgSpeed / 10, 0, 5);

    if (shake > 0.5) {
      for (let yarn of this.yarns) {
        for (let p of yarn.points) {
          p.vx += random(-shake, shake);
          p.vy += random(-shake, shake);
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

function setup() {
  createCanvas(canvasWidth, canvasHeight);
  wovenGrid = new WovenGrid();

  video = createCapture(VIDEO);
  video.size(canvasWidth, canvasHeight);
  video.hide();

  handpose = ml5.handpose(video, () => {
    console.log("Handpose ready");
  });

  handpose.on("predict", results => {
    predictions = results;
  });
}

function draw() {
  background(30);

  if (predictions.length > 0) {
    const hand = predictions[0];
    const tips = [8, 12, 16, 20]; // 指尖 landmark index
    const tipLabels = ["INDEX", "MIDDLE", "RING", "PINKY"];

    for (let i = 0; i < tips.length; i++) {
      let tipIndex = tips[i];
      let label = tipLabels[i];
      let [x, y] = hand.landmarks[tipIndex];
      x = canvasWidth - x; // 镜像翻转 webcam

      // 1️⃣ 吸引 yarn
      wovenGrid.applyFingerAttraction(x, y);

      // 2️⃣ ✨ 视觉提示（添加部分）
      noFill();
      stroke(255, 255, 255, 180);
      strokeWeight(2);
      ellipse(x, y, 20, 20); // 白圈

      noStroke();
      fill(255, 200);
      textSize(10);
      textAlign(CENTER, CENTER);
      text(label, x, y - 15); // 标签
    }

    // 3️⃣ 动作扰动
    wovenGrid.applyDisturbance(hand.landmarks);
  }

  wovenGrid.update();
  wovenGrid.display();
}

</script>
</body>
</html>
